message:
fix(parser): replace unwrap() in fuzzy_keyword_match with safe pattern match

Replace best_match.unwrap().1 in the fuzzy diagram type detection loop
with a proper match expression, eliminating a potential panic if the
Option invariant was ever violated. Structurally identical logic, just
safe.
